case_title: OLMEDO, RICHARD F. vs. FORD, PHILLIP et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLMEDO, RICHARD F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORD, PHILLIP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 CLARA ST, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION ON ORIGINAL LEASE DONE PER CRC 522

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLMEDO, RICHARD F. AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, PHILLIP
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT FORD, PHILLIP STAYED UNTIL MAY-10-1995, $126.00 DEPOSITED AS RENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, PHILLIP
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT FORD, PHILLIP ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
